observations.archetype_gloss: A mentor figure offering practical wisdom and guidance
observations.summary: Aviel acts as a Wise Guide archetype by offering advice to Dan, encouraging him to seek tangible answers by naming a stone and connecting with a power he can physically touch, thus guiding Dan's quest for understanding.

evidence.quote: Three nights ago Aviel had hissed across their fire: "If you are still searching for your source, boy, pick up a stone and give it a name. Seek answers from a power you can touch."

accepted_observations.summary: Aviel acts as a Wise Guide archetype by offering advice to Dan, encouraging him to seek tangible answers by naming a stone and connecting with a power he can physically touch, thus guiding Dan's quest for understanding.
